case_title: REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF VS SHANNON ROSS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $860.00 FILED BY REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SHANNON ROSS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHANNON ROSS $1,180.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHANNON ROSS
